word: G3105 - μαίνομαι - maínomai - mah'-ee-nom-ahee - Be beside self

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μαίνομαι

- Transliteration: Mainomai

- Phonetic: mah'-ee-nom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to be mad, to rave

a. of one who so speaks that he seems not to be in his right mind

- Origin: middle voice from a primary mao (to long for, through the idea of insensate craving)

- TDNT entry: 10:00,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Middle voice from a primary word μάω maō (to long for; through the idea of insensate craving); to rave as a maniac: - be beside self (mad).
